jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Melorra - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
